summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Geological Resources (Ores, Fossil Fuels)
summary_sections.content_html:
Geological Resources

Metallic Ores

  • Formed by magmatic, hydrothermal, sedimentary, and weathering processes.
  • Examples: iron (hematite), copper (chalcopyrite), gold (native), aluminum (bauxite).

Fossil Fuels

  • Coal: From ancient swamp vegetation; peat → lignite → bituminous → anthracite.
  • Oil & Natural Gas: From marine organisms buried under sediment; require source rock, migration, and trap.

Non-Metallic Resources

  • Sand, gravel, limestone (cement), gypsum (drywall), clay, phosphates (fertilizer).
